Title: Verify user starts at homepage
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Check if the user is redirected to the homepage

Title: Verify user can navigate to settings
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the homepage
2. Click on the settings menu
3. Check if the user is redirected to the settings page
Expected Result: User is on the settings page

Title: Verify user can navigate to alerts
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the homepage
2. Click on the alerts menu
3. Check if the user is redirected to the alerts page
Expected Result: User is on the alerts page

Title: Verify user can add a new alert
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the alerts page
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the alerts page
2. Click on the "Add Alert" button
3. Fill in all required fields
4. Click on the "Add Category" button
5. Select a category from the list
6. Click on the "Save" button
Expected Result: The new alert is saved and displayed on the alerts page

Title: Verify user cannot add an alert with missing fields
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the alerts page
Test Data: Missing input for one or more fields
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the alerts page
2. Click on the "Add Alert" button
3. Fill in some required fields but leave one or more fields empty
4. Click on the "Add Category" button
5. Select a category from the list
6. Click on the "Save" button
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the alert is not saved

Title: Verify user can view alerts
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the alerts page
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the alerts page
2. Check if all alerts are displayed
Expected Result: All alerts are displayed on the alerts page

Title: Verify user can view alert details
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the alerts page
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the alerts page
2. Click on a specific alert
3. Check if the alert details are displayed
Expected Result: The details of the selected alert are displayed

Title: Verify user can access profile settings
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the homepage
2. Click on the profile menu
3. Check if the user is redirected to the profile settings page
Expected Result: User is on the profile settings page

Title: Verify user can update profile information
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the profile settings page
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile settings page
2. Update the profile information
3. Click on the "Save" button
Expected Result: The profile information is updated and saved

Title: Verify user cannot update profile information with missing fields
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the profile settings page
Test Data: Missing input for one or more fields
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile settings page
2. Update the profile information but leave one or more fields empty
3. Click on the "Save" button
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the profile information is not updated

Title: Verify user can navigate to apartments screen
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the profile settings page
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile settings page
2. Click on the "Apartments" button
3. Check if the user is redirected to the apartments screen
Expected Result: User is on the apartments screen

Title: Verify user can navigate back to profile settings
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the apartments screen
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the apartments screen
2. Click on the "Back" button
3. Check if the user is redirected to the profile settings page
Expected Result: User is on the profile settings page
